Mireille Coppersmith is the founder of Inkwhale Co. Mireille pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

Inkwhale Co is a seed-stage company. Founded by Mireille Coppersmith. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Galeharbor Ventures is an early-stage fund that co-invests on seed rounds.

turns.text: Draft a memo for the partner meeting: Mireille Coppersmith and Vada Tavenner both want Galeharbor Ventures in the Inkwhale Co round.
Make the memo lead with traction, then risks, then the ask.
